violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (Ice Machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice Machine was emptied during time of inspection. Ice was voluntarily disposed of. Establishment is to send photo of clean and sanitized machine to RIDOH before resuming use. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the grill have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non Food contact surfaces must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 05/03/2025

Food contact surfaces of ice machine was observed with a slight accumulation of brown residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2023

The floor in the walk-in freezer area and production area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2023
